subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee rest My glory and My loving-kindness. The letter of the honored Afnán Mahmúd, upon him be the glory of God, the King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه جناب افنان محمود علیه بهاء الله الملک
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
